annotations.text: No official consumer access to any of the three. Domestic models (DeepSeek, Qwen, Ernie) fill the gap.
Not officially supported by OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google; reachable only via VPN.
Historically blocked under sanctions; access remains unsupported.
Restricted under sanctions; none of the three are officially supported.
ChatGPT was briefly banned by the Italian data-protection authority in 2023, then restored after privacy changes.
Claude and Gemini both launched here months after their U.S. debut due to EU rollout timing.
